## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot and optimize competitor analysis in Galileo for Mara's brand.](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Competitors can be manually edited (add/delete) in the Context tab for more accurate analysis](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Sources tab reveals frequently cited domains, potentially uncovering unexpected competitors](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [257 prompts are currently active, viewable by filtering for "speed prompt"](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Andrew will rerun data after Mara updates competitors to improve competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

## Topics

### Customizing Competitor List

  - [Auto-generated competitors not always 100% accurate, especially for specific divisions/focus](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Users can edit competitor list in Context tab: delete all, add new ones, or modify existing](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [No known limit on competitor additions (20+ observed)](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Mara to update competitor list for her brand](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Uncovering Potential Competitors

  - [Sources tab reveals frequently cited domains in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Filter by domain to see which companies appear most often](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Can uncover unexpected competitors for consideration](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Useful for identifying mindshare competitors or expanding competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Prompts and Data Analysis

  - [257 active prompts currently in use](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Viewable by filtering for "speed prompt" in Topics section](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Initial confusion due to "11 rows" display in Topics tab](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Andrew to rerun data analysis after Mara updates competitor list](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### User Interface Navigation

  - [Dashboard initially showed no competitive data, causing concern](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Sources tab provides deeper insights into cited domains and potential competitors](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Prompts viewable in Topics section by changing filter to "speed prompt"](https://fathom.video/share/M148hdDRDJy8zNvSvZdRYDzoarnkLCrk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Next Steps

  - Mara to update competitor list in Context tab immediately after the call
  - Mara to notify Andrew via Slack once competitors are updated
  - Andrew to rerun data analysis with new competitor list
  - Follow-up review of updated competitive analysis results
